prompts.text: 用三句话总结今天保存的剪藏重点。
List three questions this note should help answer later.
从这些内容里提取两个可以立刻执行的行动项。
Compare the strongest and weakest claim in the passage.
指出这段材料可能遗漏的一个反例。
Create a concise outline for a five-minute briefing.
把这条记忆改写成适合一周后复习的提示。
Name one risk, one assumption, and one follow-up question.
